name: ferment_scaling
description: Ferment accrues 1 Poison per turn held on Steep, and is kept when played: fermented 2 turns it applies 4 + 2 = 6 Poison, measured as tick damage on a normalized 20-HP enemy (20 -> 14)

checks.note: absorbs the enemy turn, and doubles as the turn barrier below
block only clears at the start of your next turn, so this waits out a real turn; ferment 1
normalize immediately before measuring: this roster is not seed-stable
Steep cost 1 of the turn's 3 energy, so the play resolved before the turn ends
4 base + 2 fermented = 6 Poison ticks at the enemy's turn (20 -> 14)
